nasb.text: Behold, I Myself have created the smith who blows the fire of coals And brings out a weapon for its work; And I have created the destroyer to ruin.

esv.text: Behold, I have created the smith who blows the fire of coals and produces a weapon for its purpose. I have also created the ravager to destroy;

cnv.text: 看哪！那吹炭火、 打造出合用武器的鐵匠，是我創造的； 那殘害人、行毀滅的，也是我創造的。

ccb.text: 看啊，是我造了扇旺炭火、 铸造合用兵器的铁匠， 是我造了毁灭者。

csbs.text: 看哪！是我创造了铁匠—— 他吹燃炭火、打造出发挥功用的武器； 是我创造了毁灭者去施行毁灭。
